about.p1: Our mission emphasizes corporate citizenship and solving our customers' and stakeholders' most critical challenges by fostering trust and innovation.
about.p2: Radar Sniper is a security-focused startup pioneering enhanced, next-generation solutions and innovations across Cyber Security, Internet of Things (IoT), and AI-powered Drones development.
about.p3: We support financial institutions (NBFCs, Banks) with specialized Information Security Consultancy Services, providing budgeted and customized solutions for Compliance, Auditing, and Implementation as per SEBI and RBI guidelines.
about.p4: The founder is responsible for Global Security Strategy, development and management of the company's technology including Enterprise Security Architecture, Security development and technology operations.

pollination-drones.title: AI-Powered Pollination & Sensing
pollination-drones.desc: Autonomous AIML swarm drones designed to tackle cross-pollination and environmental sensing issues for Indian floriculture and agriculture.
pollination-drones.intro: We aim to fix the labor-intensive problem of hand-done cross-pollination by using self-flying AIML drones and Swarm drones. Our drones leverage nature-inspired robotics to boost agricultural output efficiently.

sections.heading: How It Works
body: Our drones are equipped with advanced VOC (Volatile Organic Compound) sensors like MICS6814 to spot flower scent patterns. This specific technology helps them identify exactly which flowers are ready for pollination.
By using team-work plans (Swarm Intelligence), many drones work together to cover big farm areas without doing the same job twice. This brings number-based smarts to pollination for the first time.

sections.heading: Key Benefits
body: Eliminates the high cost and scarcity of manual labor for pollination.
Increases crop yield through focused, effective pollination.
Scalable solution that works well for both small and large Indian flower and fruit farms.
Provides environmental sensing data alongside pollination services.

sections.heading: Target Segments
body: Commercial Farmers & Greenhouses
Polyhouses & Growers
Orchards and Plantation Farms
Farmer Producer Organizations (FPOs)
Agri-Tech Service Providers
Agricultural Universities & R&D Bodies
Export-Oriented Farms

iot-security.title: IoT Security
iot-security.desc: Comprehensive protection for connected devices, ensuring data integrity across your entire network ecosystem.
iot-security.intro: The Internet of Things (IoT) connects smart machines, but this connectivity introduces risks. Radar Sniper specializes in securing sensors and operations that support the world of IoT.

sections.heading: Industry Context
body: IoT is a quickly growing segment. While the internet connects people, IoT connects smart machines. However, the fast expansion of industry-led automation in Smart Cities, Smart Hospitals, and Smart Homes has led to critical security vulnerabilities.
Public warning systems, logistics trackers, and emergency communications rely on this mesh. Securing it is not optional; it is vital for safety.

sections.heading: Main Attack Scenarios
body: Man-in-the-Middle Attack (MitM): Eavesdropping on communication between devices.
Denial-of-Service (DoS): Disrupting critical IoT services.
Rogue Endpoints: Unauthorized devices injected into the network causing unwanted behavior.
Compromised Endpoints: Vulnerable software allowing system invasion.
Data Leakage: Unprotected data leading to financial and reputational damage.

sections.heading: Handling IoT Security
body: Determine vulnerability and penetration testing scope.
Keep an eye on standard vulnerabilities (missing patches) and deep ones (lack of encryption).
Create and enforce company policies on Bluetooth and pairing.
Invest in visibility solutions to detect insecure devices immediately.

sections.heading: Why Radar Sniper?
body: Our IoT Security testing services cover Sensors, DAST (Dynamic Application Security Scanning), and SAST (Static Application Security Testing). We utilize the latest methodologies like OWASP combined with rigorous verification.
We ensure confidentiality and integrity of data in transit and at rest.

iso-27001.title: ISO 27001 Compliance
iso-27001.desc: Information Security Management Systems (ISMS) implementation and consultancy for global standards.
iso-27001.intro: We assist organizations in achieving ISO 27001 certification, ensuring your Information Security Management System (ISMS) meets global standards.

sections.heading: Phase I: Assessment
body: We assess the maturity of your organization's information security and the divergence from best practice. Our security control review covers controls concerning technology, processes, and employees.

sections.heading: Phase II: Preparation
body: We assist with interpreting standard requirements and developing your ISO 27001 documentation system. We prepare missing documentation, author information security policies, and support risk analysis methodology.
We help minimize risks to an acceptable level and prepare the Statement of Applicability for the audit.

sections.heading: Phase III: Audit Facilitation
body: We facilitate the process of achieving ISO 27001 certification, enabling you to prove to external parties that your organization complies with international standards.

sections.heading: Our Advantages
body: Implementation increases security awareness among employees.
Achieve ISO certifications on-time and within budget.
Best-in-class System/Network security testing included.

soc.title: SOC Operations
soc.desc: 24/7 Security Operating Centre monitoring to detect, analyze, and respond to cybersecurity incidents in real-time.
soc.intro: Our Security Operations Center (SOC) provides round-the-clock surveillance of your digital infrastructure, ensuring threats are detected before they become breaches.

sections.heading: Real-Time Monitoring
body: We utilize advanced SIEM (Security Information and Event Management) tools to aggregate logs from all your endpoints, analyzing them for suspicious patterns using behavioral analytics.

sections.heading: Incident Response
body: 24/7/365 Eyes on Glass monitoring.
Rapid Triage and Containment of threats.
Forensic Analysis post-incident.
Regular Threat Hunting exercises.

products.heading: Advanced Drone Systems
products.subheading: High-performance aerial solutions for agriculture and surveillance.

krishi-sakha-11l.name: Krishi Sakha 11L
krishi-sakha-11l.desc: The Krishi Sakha 11L is a specialized small-class rotorcraft (RPAS) designed for maximum efficiency in Indian farming conditions. Featuring a carbon-fiber frame for high strength and low weight, it operates with Visual Line of Sight (VLOS). It includes a high-density polymer tank and is capable of spraying up to 60 acres per day.

land-mapping-drone.name: Terra Mapper Survey Drone
land-mapping-drone.desc: Engineered for professional surveyors and land developers. This drone utilizes Real-Time Kinematic (RTK) positioning to deliver centimeter-accurate 3D maps and topographic surveys. Ideal for urban planning, construction site monitoring, and agricultural land leveling analysis.

pollination-drone.name: Cross-Pollinator Drones
pollination-drone.desc: A nature-inspired robotic solution solving the global pollinator crisis. Equipped with Volatile Organic Compound (VOC) sensors, these drones autonomously identify flowers ready for pollination via scent patterns. Using swarm intelligence, they ensure 100% crop coverage without duplication, vital for high-yield fruit and flower farming.

smart-soil-monitor.name: Smart Soil Monitoring System
smart-soil-monitor.desc: Transform farming from gambling into guaranteed engineering. This all-in-one station goes beyond basic sensing by monitoring Soil NPK, environmental AQI, and real-time storm risks with a blinking alert system. Integrated with a Crop Selector and Fertilizer AI, it predicts disease risks and provides actionable prescriptions before damage occurs, ensuring export-grade quality and protecting against total season financial loss.
specs: AI Features: Fertilizer Recs & Disease Risk

founder.bio: A visionary technocrat revolutionizing the skies with AI-driven drones for agriculture, land mapping, and cross-pollination. With 19+ years of experience in global security strategy, Jaykumar integrates military-grade cybersecurity into autonomous aerial systems, ensuring that our drone solutions are efficient and secure by design.
